_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant oscillatory activity in neurofibromatosis type 1: an EEG study of resting state and working memory.

_contextSnippet: There was a significant difference in PAF between groups (F(1,28) = 12.276, p = 0.002, ηp2 = 0.305), whereby compared to CON, NF1 showed a lower PAF
details: Successfully processed EEG data for spectral analysis, contributing to identification of significant peak alpha frequency differences between groups (F(1,28) = 12.276, p = 0.002, ηp2 = 0.305)
